page_metadata.biotools__summary: An R package which functions provide an automated pipeline to perform expression analysis for Applied Biosystems Genome Survey Microarray (AB1700) data format. Functions include data preprocessing, filtering, control probe analysis, statistical analysis. A GUI interface is also provided.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: An R package which functions provide an automated pipeline to perform expression analysis for Applied Biosystems Genome Survey Microarray (AB1700) data format. Functions include data preprocessing, filtering, control probe analysis, statistical analysis. A GUI interface is also provided.
